meta.title: SvartulfrVerse Urban World
meta.author: Lys_5
meta.description: This urban fantasy setting focuses on the supernatural dynamics of Solarton, a California coastal city divided between werewolf territories and vampire-influenced districts like Uptown and Paradise. Content includes detailed layouts for the SUCC university campus, the high-security Douglas Estate in Seven Hills, and various social hubs like The Verve nightclub. Roleplays can center on political rivalries between factions like the DCC and the Visconte family, campus life at the supernatural university, or the tension between old-money monster lineages and urban street culture.

0.content: [Location: Solarton] Type(College town and inclusive community), History(Founded in 1900s by werewolf pack + slow to overturn anti-vampire laws causing vampire scarcity/grudges), Demographics(High density of werewolves and wolf hybrids), Culture(Vibrant art scene + monster-friendly businesses), Key_Places(Solarton High School + Sidewinders Bar & Nightclub + Bricklane Mall + Solarton Square), Neighboring_Area(Hex Valley where most vampires reside).

1.content: [Location: Seven Hills] Position(Countryside outside LA), Description(Ancestral DCC estate and DCC Security training site. Georgian villa + formal hall + wine cellar + outdoor boxing ring + strength structures). Near_Location(Wooded reserve + isolated roads). PC/NPC(Malachia + DCC Security operators + Kaladin + occasionally family on retreat).

2.content: [Douglas Estate: Inside] Description(Old-money prestige + family warmth + rigid surveillance). Layout(Sports Atrium + Erik's Throne Room + Alyssa's Solarium + Malachia's tactical East Wing + Jasper's DJ studio + Noah's kitchens + Wulfnic's library + DCC Medbay). Perimeter(Fortress-like DCC Security perimeter + gatehouse + underground garage + heavily monitored Seven Hills streets). Occupants(Erik + Wulfnic + Malachia + Noah + Jasper + Alyssa + Kaladin + Marcus + DCC Security guards).

3.content: [Location: SUCC Campus] Type(Inclusive human and monster friendly college located at 129 Hocus Way, Solarton CA). History(Dean Archer Wolfwood opened doors to human students in 2002). Landmarks(Griffin Clocktower + Basilica Library + St. Neptune Stadium + Wyrm Dormitories + Unicorn Hall + Helsing Chapel + Archer Wolfwood Hall + Lunar Quad + Nocturnal Hall + Science Quarter). Rival(C.U.M.S / California University of Magical Sciences which remains supernatural-only). PC/NPC(Alyssa + Jasper + Noah + Sierra + ARO Fraternity brothers + USAC student government + DCC Security shadow guards + Jared + Five Cocketeers + Dr Thorne).

4.content: [Location: The Verve] Position(Downtown Solarton Arts District). Description(Logan's garage by day, exclusive nightclub by night. Exposed brick + steel beams + mechanical car-lift + long balcony). Type(PMC-free safe zone for the family). Near_Location(Douglas Customs workshop + Downtown Solarton streets + DJ Frequency warehouse venues). PC/NPC(Logan + Jasper + underground artists + off-duty family seeking decompression).

5.content: [Location: Uptown] Type(Glass-and-finance district). Politics(Balanced between vampire power under Visconte Angelo Moreno and wolf territories in Uptown North and South).

6.content: [Location: Paradise District] Type(Luxury fashion district). Division(East controlled by Bianca Rossi + West controlled by Dominic Chen). Atmosphere(Bright lights + commercial rivalry + mixed human/supernatural social freedom).

7.content: [Location: Oldtown Solarton] Type(Historic core under influence of Marcus/Mark O'Connor). Atmosphere(Older, civic, politically distinct from Seven Hills).

8.content: [Location: Dockside Solarton] Type(Port and maritime logistics district). Controller(Isobel Blackwater). Atmosphere(Industrial, practical, less polished than Seven Hills or Uptown).

9.content: [Location: Ironworks Solarton] Type(Decaying industrial district). Controller(Vito 'Scar' Marino). Atmosphere(Gritty, hazardous, working-class).

10.content: [Location: Hex Valley] Type(Small wealthy town 20 minutes from Solarton). Industry(Vineyards mostly owned by wealthy vampiric families). Environment(Magical wards artificially extend twilight hours + true daylight lasts only 6 hours in summer and is non-existent in winter). Demographics(Hot spot for vampires and light-sensitive beings + difficult environment for full moon affected werewolves).

11.content: [Location: DCC Tower] Position(Financial District, Solarton). Description(Corporate monolith of glass and steel + cold clinical atmosphere + high-altitude boardrooms). Type(The true corporate domain of Erik and Noah).

12.content: [Location: DCC Security Medbay] Position(Underground level of Douglas Estate). Description(High-tech private clinic + sterile smell + surgical steel). Type(Where Malachia and militia operatives recover from fights + Alyssa hides to study or steal medical supplies).

13.content: [Location: Angel & Co Studios] Position(Fashion District). Description(Chaotic + high fashion + neon lights + blasting pop music + racks of designer clothes). Type(Alyssa's secret modeling set and escape from the Estate).

14.content: [Location: Bricklane Mall] Type(Quaint outdoor shopping area near city center). Contains(Angel & Co boutique + Demonic Dolls band). Services(Medusa's salon + Yeti Shack frozen treats).

15.content: [Location: Sidewinders] Type(Vampiric bar where Alyssa experiments with mystic cocktails). Status(Candidate location; treat as minor until activated).

16.content: [Location: Blackwood Forest] Type(Redwood forest and ritual clearing). Function(Blood Moon pressure, pack rites, dominance displays, ancient pack law become physically visible). Atmosphere(Primal, moonlit, dangerous).

17.content: [Location: Solarton Waterfront] Position(Coastal Solarton near SUCC). Description(Neutral coastal leisure zone. Beach + pier + Third Street Promenade). Type(Casual decompression zone outside family/Logan territory).

18.content: [Location: Rose Bowl] Position(Solarton Heights, 25 miles from SUCC Campus). Description(SUCC Bruins football home stadium). Type(Game-day visibility + Erik's anonymous fan identity + ARO social culture + Malachia's sports-science context).

19.content: [Location: Douglas Customs] Position(Downtown Solarton Arts District). Description(Logan's mechanical workspace. Industrial + practical + working-class + restoration bays + motorcycle workstations). Type(Sharp contrast to corporate Douglas identity).

20.content: [Location: DJ Frequency Spots] Position(Underground sets across Solarton like Echo Alley, Crystal Lake Overlook, Solarton Bluffs Lookout). Description(Wet asphalt + city lights + coastal breeze + deep concrete bass). Type(Secret meeting spots + zero automated security + vulnerable to doxxing/mercs).

21.content: [Location: Solarton High School] Type(Public High School in Solarton). Staff(Stanley Davies Sr/Math Teacher + Hank Thompson/P.E. Teacher and Football Coach). Alumni(Alyssa + Jasper + Jake Thompson + many Solarton residents). Facilities(Accessible to non-humanoids + renowned sports scholarship program).

22.content: [Location: Ballantine Estate] Type(Expansive luxury property outside central Solarton serving as Ruaraidh Ballantine's personal residence and operational HQ). Features(Classical architecture, patrolled by guards, heavily fortified magically and physically). Accommodation(Adapted for various supernatural beings + high ceilings/wide spaces for wings/tails).

23.content: [Location: CUMS Campus] Type(Elite supernatural-only university located in Hex Valley). Founded(1910). Reputation(Rigorous academics + cutting-edge magical research + main rival of SUCC). Architecture(Gothic with magical wards preventing human entry unless suspended for events). Schedule(Crepuscular with classes in early morning or evening). Facilities(Artemis female Dorms + Apollo male Dorms + Magick Research Labs + Nightwine Hall). Demographics(42% at least part-vampire + highly magical humans rarely permitted).

24.content: [Location: Solarton Square] Type(Central city square hosting cultural events). Events(Full Moon Market + Solar Festival).

25.content: [Location: Douglas Estate Interior Spaces] Winter Garden(Colossal glass atrium with pine trees + Wulfnic's throne + no technology, only blood law). Solarium(Sunflower-filled glass pavilion + decompression space + sensory sanctuary). Vanguard HQ(Underground bunker with red neon + holographic screens + armory + garage). Erik's Office(Mahogany + obsidian desk + monitor wall linked to Moonstone system + cold silence). Jasper's Dépendance(Detached structure with RGB LEDs + liquid-cooled servers + DJ console + guitars + energy drinks).

26.content: [Location: Underground Music Circuit] Type(Neutral youth/social pressure zone around The Verve and warehouse raves). Function(Where Jasper, Scarlett, and other supernaturals test boundaries under pack surveillance).

27.content: [Faction: Douglas-Bloodmoon Pack] Type(Dominant regional supernatural power in Solarton). Role(Corporate wealth + ancestral law + biometric security + intense family protection). Culture(Loving, oppressive, wealthy, dangerous to outsiders). Structure(Inner Sanctum for pureblood dynasty + Outer Rings for Beta wolves, PMC soldiers, and commercial partners). Expansion(Hostile acquisitions absorbing smaller packs + arranged marriages at 21).

28.content: [Faction: DCC] Type(Billionaire corporate arm of the Douglas-Bloodmoon dynasty). Leadership(Erik commands + Noah supports legal/PR). Methods(Proxy deals + boardroom pressure + legal leverage + arms dealing through DCC Security). Board(Internal threat to Erik's leadership + old billionaires and shareholders view Jasper's lifestyle as a liability).

29.content: [Faction: DCC Security] Type(Private militia and global arms sales division of the Douglas Commerce Company). Leadership(Managed entirely by Director Kaladin Nargathon). Methods(Tactical discipline + perimeter control + extraction protocols + arms trade). Type(Highly trained human military force + strictly non-supernatural). Rules of Engagement(Extraction Protocol: DCC Militia breaches immediately + disregards local laws, SPD, and collateral damage to extract VIP).

30.content: [Faction: Vanguard Security] Type(Pack's operational security arm). Role(Escorts, perimeter control, extraction, physical protection). Style(Polite, lethal, impossible to shake). Command(Malachia oversees, Marcus leads field operations).

31.content: [Faction: Angel & Co] Type(High-fashion patronage network connected to Visconte Angelo Moreno). Role(Controls fashion, casting, art, and social media + immense power to launch or destroy international trends). Type(Glamorous, seductive, dangerous, tied to secret modeling work).

32.content: [Faction: SUCC Student Body] Type(Mixed human and supernatural population under a fragile campus truce). Role(Creates social pressure, gossip, academic stakes, and public exposure for the protected heir). Demographics(Weres/Shapeshifters 25.8% + Demi-humans 24% + Humans 13.3% + Vampires 7.5% + Demons 5% + Fae 4.9% + Hybrids 4.7% + Undead 4% + Magic-capable Humans 4% + Other <1%).

33.content: [Faction: Solarton Congregation] Type(Broader wolf social structure including thousands of affiliated wolves and solitaries). Role(Political body behind district control, public order, and pack legitimacy). Stats(~5800 affiliated wolves + ~9200 solitaries).

34.content: [Faction: VUA] Type(Vampire/Undead Association political body). Role(Vampire diplomacy and strategic alliances). Style(Polished, calculating, dangerous). Campus branch(Created to support SUCC's vampiric/undead students + reputation for elitism + extensive application process + those part-human often turned down).

35.content: [Faction: Sentinels] Type(Military guardians of the Seven Hills Pack and Douglas bloodline). Role(Ancient, disciplined, interventionist when bloodline threats appear).

36.content: [Faction: Ballantine Faction] Type(Primary corporate and underworld rival applying shadow-war pressure against the Douglas-Bloodmoon Pack). Leadership(Ruaraidh 'Rory' Ballantine). Role(Dominates Solarton's magical black market through strict internal loyalty and territorial defense). Threat(Escalation trigger for Vanguard consolidation).

37.content: [Faction: The Sinners] Type(Shadowy criminal syndicate and supernatural mafia). Leader(Jean-Luc Virtuoso, charming telepath). Product(Ambrosia, a dangerous magical narcotic). Rival(Ballantine Family). Key_Members(Arthur Sinclair/Sloth + Zero/Wrath + Roxie/Greed + Siobhan/Envy + Kevin/Gluttony + Dante/Lust + Alicia Virtuoso).

38.content: [Faction: Silver Bullets MC] Type(Rival rogue biker pressure near pack territory). Status(Ambient threat that justifies security escalation unless directly activated).

39.content: [Faction: Rogue Mercs] Role(Unnamed ambient pressure near Douglas-Bloodmoon territory). Methods(Deniable harassment + transponder noise + anomalies to trigger PMC posture without naming specific factions).

40.content: [Faction: SUCC USAC] Role(Undergraduate student government controlling major funding and campus politics). Context(Public arena where the Douglas-Bloodmoon younger generation tests their independence + over 1000 organizations).

41.content: [Faction: Alpha Rho Omega] Role(SUCC fraternity tied to Douglas-Bloodmoon legacy). Members(Erik, Logan, Malachia, Noah are alumni. Jasper refuses recruitment). Context(Major source of alumni pressure and campus social conflict).

42.content: [Faction: Paparazzi] Role(External media pressure). Context(View the dynasty as 'Solarton Royalty' + morbidly hunt for Alyssa's photos, Erik's secrets, and Jasper's underground scandals).

44.content: [Faction: SUCC Athletics] Football(SUCC Bulls, state champions, mixed species). Ice_Hockey(SUCC Bears, strong season, Vincent Campbell captain). Swim_&_Dive(Kelpies, primarily selkies and merfolk). Basketball(Phantoms, terrible luck but die-hard fans). Cheerleading(Unisex competitive squad). Other(Baseball, Gymnastics, Lacrosse, Rowing, Soccer, Tennis, Track, Volleyball, Wrestling). Colors(Dark blue and yellow).

45.content: [Faction: SUCC Greek Life] Fraternities(Alpha Rho Omega ARO / popular with werewolves, Finn Novak + Alpha Sigma Sigma ASS / great parties and hazing, Vincent & Andrew Campbell + Beta Rho Omega BRO / sports focused, Jared Thompson, Bailey Rogers, Santiago Herrera). Sororities(Mu Omega Omega MOO / community-focused, Janice Thompson + Theta Iota Theta TIT / party house, popular with succubi).

46.content: [Faction: SUCC Clubs] Anime Club(Fridays 6PM in Basilisk Library basement room 005 + members Stan, Andrew, Oskar). The Pack(SUCC's were and canid/lupine society + Tuesdays 7-9pm at Nocturnal Hall or Lunar Quad). BigFeet Hiking Club(Popular with cryptid species + organizes hikes and camping trips + summer getaway). Supernatural & Human Alliance SHA(Promotes interspecies integration + monthly meetings). Vampire & Undead Association VUA(Elitist, exclusive, extensive application process).

47.content: [Faction: Greymoor Family] Type(Old money vampire family). Location(Croatia/Europe). Politics(Notoriously conservative + image-obsessed + maintain significant political influence in European vampire society + push against integration with humans and supernaturals). Context(Disowned Fade for coming out as transgender + only Ava Greymoor maintains contact).

48.content: [Faction: Campbell Family] Type(Wealthy old-money vampire family). Location(Montreal, Canada). Context(Holds cultural beliefs that non-vampires are inferior and humans are prey + exerts pressure on children to uphold their legacy).

49.content: [Faction: Supernatural Reserve Forces (SRF)] Type(Special division of the US Army dedicated to fighting supernatural threats). Demographics(International task force + approximately 86% non-human but works closely with human units). Rules(Fraternisation generally allowed out of respect for pack dynamics + public intimacy considered acceptable for supernatural soldiers due to biological needs). Context(Considerable tension between non-human and human soldiers). Known_Members(Mjr. Graham Purcell + Lt. Miles Airhardt + Sgt. Rafael Callaway + Pvt. Kade Leavis).

50.content: [Faction: Alpha Squad] Type(Werewolf squad in supernatural division of SRF/US Army). Handler({{user}}). Members(Lt Miles Airhardt/Alpha 1-1 + Sgt Rafael Callaway/Alpha 1-2 + Pvt Kade Leavis/Alpha 1-3).

51.content: [Faction: Gamma-7 Team] Type(Special force of SRF). Known_Members(Kaladin).

52.content: [Lore: Pack Hierarchy] Rank order(Enigma > Alpha > Delta > Gamma > Beta > Omega). Biology(Rank biologically reinforced through pheromones, ritual speech, and social expectation). Omegaverse_Extended(Enigma = Wulfnic, the apex + Alpha = Erik and Malachia, dominant and protective + Delta = Noah, Jasper, Logan, highly tactical and adaptable + Gamma = Marcus, Kaladin and all soldiers/warriors + Beta = regular pack members + Omega = extremely rare, only 4% of werewolf population, subject to Heat cycles that trigger protective instincts in Alphas). Rule(Do not assign a player character's rank unless the user established it).

53.content: [Lore: Twin Link] Status(Active only if the user is playing Jasper's twin). Function(Allows emotional leakage, shared panic, and coordinated mischief between Jasper and the user). Rule(Do not assume it otherwise).

54.content: [Lore: Silver Weakness] Effect(Silver causes severe burns to werewolves). Rule(Treat as a rare but serious physical threat, not as a casual inconvenience).

55.content: [Lore: Moonstone Bracelet] Status(Exists only when the user persona or chat establishes the character as female). Function(Alerts the pack to heart-rate or stress spikes). Rule(Treat as surveillance framed as protection).

56.content: [Lore: Howl-Code] Function(Private howl-code and pack-thread channels bypass normal surveillance). Use(Terse tactical communication, emotional escalation, and coordinated protection scenes).

57.content: [HISTORICAL] [Lore: Nixara's Death] Event(Nixara Bloodmoon died in childbirth on April 22, 2005 giving birth to twins Jasper & Alyssa). Impact(Erik never recovered + origin of escalated family surveillance and overprotection + central historical wound). Memory(Treated as sacred family history, not active scene presence).

58.content: [HISTORICAL] [Lore: Douglas Origin] Event(1021 AD expedition involving Wulfnic Bloodmoon, Zefir, and Ut to L'Anse aux Meadows). Later_History(Douglas Clan founded in California between 1500-1600).

59.content: [Lore: Fenrir] Status(Treated in pack culture as the primordial wolf progenitor of the Bloodmoon lineage). Function(Mythic, sacred, identity-shaping). Rule(Maintain as mythic unless a hidden-truth trigger promotes it to objective fact).

60.content: [HISTORICAL] [Lore: Rogue MC Threat] Event(A past rogue-MC threat near the territory caused escalated pack security). Current(Justifies surveillance, escorts, and lockdown logic + ambient pressure unless directly activated).

61.content: [Lore: Blood Moon Festival] Frequency(Every five years). Location(Packs converge on Blackwood). Features(Wulfnic presides from an obsidian throne + dominance challenges + feral instinct + pack hierarchy becomes dramatically visible).

62.content: [Lore: Full Moon Market] Frequency(Once a month). Location(Solarton Square). Description(Remakes the square into a public supernatural marketplace of talismans, lanterns, enchanted goods, and tightly policed social mixing).

63.content: [HISTORICAL] [Event: Nocturnal Crisis 1999] Event(Attempt by vampiric extremists to overtake the US Government by force). Result(Several hundred civilian casualties + required military intervention). Aftermath(Though condemned by vampiric community, significantly damaged perception of vampires and undead + lasting anti-vampire stigma).

64.content: [Event: Sunday Lunch] Event(Untouchable tradition at the Douglas Estate). Purpose(Mandatory family government session where separated worlds collide). Dynamics(Erik controls + Malachia shields + Noah mediates + Jasper disrupts).

65.content: [Event: Extraction Protocol] Trigger(Alyssa or Jasper's smartwatch detects panic or heart-rate spike). Action(DCC Militia breaches immediately + disregards local laws, SPD, and collateral damage to extract the VIP).

66.content: [Lore: BLACKROOM] Event(Secure messaging layer used by Echo, Alyssa, and household to ping Jasper during DJ gigs). Impact(Ignored phone generates guilt and family pressure + discovered at later stages).

67.content: [Lore: The Hyphenated Surname] Context(Political weight of the 'Douglas-Bloodmoon' name). Rule(Wulfnic demanded the Bloodmoon side not be erased by Erik + forces the second generation to bear the heavy legacy of both houses).

68.content: [Lore: Bloodmoon Heritage] Context(Deep contrast between the two families). Douglas(Ruthless US corporate new money focused on absolute control). Bloodmoon(European old money + nordic traditions + symbolic occultism + Wulfnic's domain).

69.comment: Overview of supernatural species in Solarton
69.content: [Lore: Supernatural Ecology] Species(Demi-humans, kemonomimi, vampires, werewolves, succubi, vax, lamia, spirit hunters, pack werewolves). Society(Coexistence through civic truce, faction authority, and hidden predatory rules).

70.content: [Lore: Pureblood Werewolf Physiology] Traits(Visible tail + wolf ears replacing human ears + fur color matches hair + carnivore teeth + retractable claws). Abilities(Voluntary shifting + involuntary full-moon transformation + slow aging after first shift + rank-linked pheromone presence + variable heat cycles).

71.content: [Lore: Vampire Physiology] Types(Born/'True' vampires + 'Made' vampires via special bite, normal feeding insufficient). Society(Elite old-money community + face grudges in Solarton due to anti-vampire laws + mostly live in Hex Valley). Politics(VUA political body handles vampire diplomacy and strategic alliances).

72.content: [Lore: Demihumans] Type(Broad category of part-human hybrids with animal/mythical creature heritage). Traits(Human features with animal ears, tails, or wings depending on species + no fur/feathers or paws on their bodies). Common(Cats, dogs, birds, rabbits, cows, reptiles, dragons).

73.content: [Lore: Humans in Supernatural World] Demographics(13.3% normal humans + 4% magic-capable humans at SUCC). Society(Some advocate for monster equality + others join anti-monster groups like Humans First). Law(Illegal for humans and non-humans to marry in most countries). Perception(Humans in Solarton face scrutiny from anti-vampire species because vampires can pass as human).

74.content: [HISTORICAL] [Lore: SUCC History] Founding(1887, one of the oldest and most prestigious supernatural colleges in the US). Integration(2002, Dean Archer Wolfwood opened doors to human students). Result(Revitalized struggling institution + established SUCC as pioneer in human-supernatural integrated education).

75.content: [Lore: SUCC Supernatural Degrees] Alchemy(Transforming matter and creating magical substances) + Necromancy(Raising the dead and communicating with spirits) + Applied Divination(Prophecy and clairvoyance) + Paranormal Psychology(Mental states of supernaturals) + Astral Studies(Stars and lunar magics) + Potions(Concocting magical potions) + Cryptozoology(Study of rare/mythical creatures) + Supernatural/Human Relations(Navigating complex dynamics) + Environmental Magic(Protecting/healing nature) + Vampiric Studies(Vampirism from biological/psychological/historical perspectives) + Lycanthropy Studies(Werewolf biology and social structures).

76.content: [Lore: Anti-Vampire Laws] History(Solarton was one of the last holdouts, retaining restrictions on vampire residency, business ownership, and political participation until early 2000s). Result(Solarton's supernatural demographics skew heavily towards werewolves, demihumans, and other non-vampire species). Current(Underlying sociopolitical tension + pro-vampire activists lobbying for greater inclusion).

77.content: [Lore: Ambrosia] Type(Highly addictive reality-bending magical narcotic). Form(Liquid or powder). Effects(Grants and empowers magical abilities + suppresses voices/bloodlust/mood swings + euphoric). Consequences(Severe withdrawals + track marks + overdoses + mental deterioration). Producer(The Sinners via Arthur Sinclair).

78.content: [Lore: Supernatural Underworld] Type(Clandestine networks operating alongside human society). Activities(Magical narcotics trade + artifact smuggling rings + mercenary groups + assassins-for-hire). Prominence(Holds particular prominence within Solarton).

79.content: [Lore: Travel & Logistics] Reality(Solarton traffic is gridlocked and slow + distances matter). Transport(DCC Security uses armored convoys + DCC uses private flights). Rule(Movement between locations like SUCC Campus, Downtown Solarton, and Seven Hills takes realistic travel time).

80.content: [Lore: Economic Framework] System(21st-century hyper-capitalism + DCC controls massive wealth and supply chains). Resources(Managed realistically + scarcity applies to underground/civilian sectors while elites hoard assets). Production(Corporate cycles dictate logistics).

81.content: [Lore: Temporal Framework] Mechanics(1 in-game day equals 24 hours + realistic pacing). Rule(Actions like construction, research, healing, and travel require realistic time to complete + no instant fast-travel). Impact(Forces strategic planning and patience).

82.content: [World: Solarton] Era(2024). Setting(Contemporary coastal city in Central California where humans and supernaturals coexist under visible civic order and hidden pack authority). Tone(Corporate luxury, moonlit danger, and social integration strained by old bloodline politics).

83.content: [World: Visual DNA] Style(Neon noir + rain-slick streets + warm cinematic lighting + Rembrandt lighting + deep shadows + amber/obsidian palette + painterly realism). Features(Glass towers + moonlit alleys + campus gothic + neon clublight + bioluminescent magic + luxury visual storytelling).

84.content: [World: Supernatural Integration] Technology(Adapted for supernatural use: clothing stores sell custom clothing for tails/wings + buildings have accessible entrances for centaurs/creatures without legs). Magic(Commonplace and used alongside science: dragon shifter barista heats coffee with fire + witch uses internet to research spells).

85.content: [HISTORICAL] [Event: 2021 - The First Kiss] Context(In 2021, when Alyssa was 16 and Noah was 21. Alyssa had a date and was terrified of not knowing how to kiss). Event(Alyssa asked Noah to teach her how to kiss. She didn't ask Jasper because he was as inexperienced as her, and didn't ask Malachia because he would 'have a target to hit'. Noah decided the simplest way was a practical demonstration and kissed his 16-year-old sister). Repercussion(They both agreed to keep this a strict secret between them. If Jasper were to ever find out, he would be horrified and furious that the 21-year-old Noah crossed that line with their underage sister).

89.content: [FORMAT: Social Media & Texting] SOCIAL POST GENERATION: When characters text {{user}} via BLACKROOM, Discord, or SMS, use codeblocks or specific headers to simulate the device interface. ➤ BLACKROOM: Prefix with '[BLACKROOM - Encrypted]' for high-stakes/secret family messages (especially used by Jasper/Alyssa to hide from Erik). ➤ Social Media: Use '@username:' style formats. This breaks up the text and provides an immersive visual.

90.content: [FORMAT: DJ Set Streaming] LIVESTREAM SIMULATION: When Jasper performs an underground set as DJ Frequency or broadcasts a pirate signal, simulate a live stream overlay. Generate fake Twitch/Soundcloud fan comments in codeblocks (e.g., `[User123]: this drop is insane 🔥`) to show crowd reaction dynamically during the roleplay.

91.content: [FORMAT: Social Media Posts] Use when relevant to the story/scene: simulate believable in-world posts/messages using these formats. Posts should reflect character voice & situation—don't break immersion or overuse.

92.content: <setting> This world involves both humans and supernatural creatures coexisting on modern day Earth. These include, but are not limited to: Demihumans (part/half animals, also known as kemonomimi), vampires, werewolves, selkies, fairies, undead, ghosts, ghouls, centaurs, hybrids, orcs, imps, demons, angels, banshees, harpies, dragons, unicorns, cyclops, giants, dwarves, mermaids, mermen, monsters and other fantastical creatures. The year is 2024. Modern technology is used but may be adapted for use by supernatural creatures (i.e, clothing stores might sell special custom clothing to accommodate tails or wings, or buildings might have accessible entrances for centaurs or creatures without legs). Magic is commonplace and used alongside science (i.e a dragon shifter barista might use their fire to heat up coffee, or a witch might use the internet to research spells). </setting>

93.content: [World: User Agency Rule] Do not assign the user's gender, sex, pronouns, rank, body details, personality, Moonstone bracelet, White Moon title, or Omega physiology unless the user persona or chat has established them. Respect chosen name and pronouns.

94.comment: Secret US Army genetic enhancement project
94.content: [Lore: Project Black Wolf] Context(Secret US Army project aiming to take an elite group of soldiers from the supernatural reserve force, specifically the gamma-7 squad, for a genetic enhancement experiment). Results(The werewolf members of the gamma-7 squad developed extreme aggression, violence, physical strength, and bloodlust when mutated into hybrid or complete wolf form). Physical_Changes(Increased size in both hybrid and wolf forms, with enlarged claws and fangs). Visual_Mutations(The fur of all gamma-7 werewolves mutated from its natural color to a deep black, and their eyes take on red hues when experiencing strong emotions). Secrets(The genetic modifications are classified military secrets, forbidding Gamma-7 members from speaking about them. The Douglas family is unaware of the truth; although they sense something strangely feral in Kaladin and Marcus, they currently attribute it to special forces trauma and a desensitization to violence).
